attributes.additional_details: The issue is people can’t enjoy buying chocolate without having to pay a hefty sum for even a small bar of chocolate. I propose we make a rule saying that not chocolate bar or packet be over £1.65 as that’s a fair price that’s in the middle and doesn’t prevent people being able to eat a good bar of chocolate.
attributes.background: I want the British government to discuss the incredible prices of different chocolates especially mini eggs which have increased by £4.56! And are becoming more rare due to working class people not being able to afford them
